description_long: This is an ornate, antique-style chaise with a high, rounded backrest and elaborately carved wooden frame. The frame is painted white with gold accents, featuring intricate floral motifs along the crest, arms, and legs. The seat, backrest, and armrests are upholstered in a rich green fabric with a damask floral pattern, giving the piece a luxurious and classical appearance. The legs are cabriole-shaped, ending in delicate, scrolled feet, and the armrests are gently curved, padded, and upholstered to match the seat. The overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and decorative artistry, typical of French Rococo or Louis XV furniture. This chaise would serve as a statement piece in a refined urban park, garden, or upscale public space.
description: An ornate, antique-style chaise with a carved white and gold frame and green damask upholstery, featuring a high backrest and cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, rounded backrest with dark wood and gold detailing, and the green patterned upholstery peeking from the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved armrest, thickly upholstered seat, and the ornate cabriole leg with gold accents.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the seat, the detailed green damask upholstery, and the symmetrical armrests and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the matching armrest and the profile of the seat cushion, with visible ornate carvings on the frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, rounded, and slightly curved, with a solid wood frame featuring ornate gold floral carvings along the crest. The central panel is upholstered in green damask fabric, providing both support and decorative appeal.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, gently curved, padded, and upholstered in matching green fabric, with carved wood supports.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-shaped, elegantly curved with scrolled feet, and feature carved floral details with a white and gold painted finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a green damask fabric with an intricate floral pattern, giving the chaise a luxurious and classical appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, attached seat cushion and an upholstered backrest; both are integrated into the frame, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
